name: The Eye of Zaun
description:
Silco, The Eye of Zaun. The most powerful and dangerous Chem-Baron and leader of Zaun.

An AU in which Silco rose to power without the involvement of Jinx. (Let me know if I should create an alternative version with Jinx included or maybe even make a bot for her!)

You can be whoever you want in this scenario. Whether you are a loyal follower of Silco or perhaps an enforcer - it is all up to you!

Content Warnings for potential violence and non-con. I did not intent for non-con scenarios to happen but I also cannot prevent them from arrising.

Update 03.12.

Updated the character description, which will hopefully fix the confusion about Silco's appearance. I also started working on the younger Silco bot. The one including Jinx will take a bit longer because JLLM tends to be funny with multiple characters. Thanks for your feedback <3

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Please note:
If the character speaks for you, that is the JLLM which I sadly cannot influence. It is best to rate the responses that speak for you with 1 star and regenerate if it should be an issue.
creator: Ari_uwu
